narratives.narrative: Threat actor CDB-FIN-11 has been observed in 3 intelligence signals. Associated vulnerabilities: CVE-2024-54529. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1595, T1199, T1078, T1059, T1068. Average risk score: 10.0/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-FIN-12 has been observed in 2 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1595, T1199, T1078, T1195, T1203. Average risk score: 10.0/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-CYB-01 has been observed in 24 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1595, T1059, T1547, T1566, T1078. Average risk score: 9.6/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-APT-28 has been observed in 5 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1566.001, T1595, T1199, T1078, T1059. Average risk score: 9.2/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-RU-01 has been observed in 2 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1078, T1059, T1547, T1203, T1476. Average risk score: 8.7/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-IR-02 has been observed in 10 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1595, T1199, T1036, T1204, T1078. Average risk score: 8.3/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.
Threat actor CDB-APT-22 has been observed in 25 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1595, T1078.001, T1059, T1530, T1547. Average risk score: 8.0/10.
Threat actor CDB-FIN-09 has been observed in 6 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1199, T1078, T1547.001, T1567, T1530. Average risk score: 7.8/10.
Threat actor CDB-CN-01 has been observed in 4 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1595, T1078, T1059, T1204.001, T1195. Average risk score: 7.5/10.

Threat actor CDB-FIN-07 has been observed in 4 intelligence signals. Associated vulnerabilities: CVE-2026-3055. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1595, T1087, T1078, T1204.001, T1195. CRITICAL: 1 zero-day alert(s) correlate with this actor's activity. Average risk score: 7.2/10.
Threat actor CDB-RAN-01 has been observed in 2 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1078, T1059, T1204.001, T1203, T1486. Average risk score: 6.9/10.

Threat actor UNC-UNKNOWN has been observed in 298 intelligence signals. Associated vulnerabilities: CVE-2026-5103, CVE-2026-30878, CVE-2026-5001, CVE-2018-25224, CVE-2025-64648. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1041, T1595, T1620, T1059, T1530. CRITICAL: 47 zero-day alert(s) correlate with this actor's activity. Average risk score: 5.8/10.

findings.recommendation: Migrate to ML-KEM (CRYSTALS-Kyber) for key exchange
Replace with ML-KEM or hybrid key exchange

stix_transport.note: TLS 1.3 uses ECDHE - quantum vulnerable for key exchange

jwt_tokens.note: Symmetric crypto - quantum resistant (Grover halves keyspace)

S9_Quantum.recommendation: Begin hybrid key exchange deployment. Inventory all RSA/ECDSA usage for PQC migration.
